---
title: "tf-idf-model"
author: "Mahin Roddur"
date: "2026-04-12"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

if (!requireNamespace("pacman", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("pacman")
}
library(pacman)

p_load(
  here,
  tidyverse,
  tidytext,
  caret,
  glmnet,
  Matrix,
  stringr
)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. LOAD DATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

df <- read.csv(here("data/processed/reviews_with_sent_scores.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. CREATE AGGREGATED SENTIMENT FEATURES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

df$sent_vader_avg <- rowMeans(
  df[, c(
    "vader_summary_compound",
    "vader_pros_compound",
    "vader_cons_compound",
    "vader_advice_compound"
  )],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

df$sent_vader_sd <- apply(
  df[, c(
    "vader_summary_compound",
    "vader_pros_compound",
    "vader_cons_compound",
    "vader_advice_compound"
  )],
  1,
  sd,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

df$sent_distilbert_avg <- rowMeans(
  df[, c(
    "distilbert_summary_signed",
    "distilbert_pros_signed",
    "distilbert_cons_signed",
    "distilbert_advice_signed"
  )],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

df$sent_distilbert_sd <- apply(
  df[, c(
    "distilbert_summary_signed",
    "distilbert_pros_signed",
    "distilbert_cons_signed",
    "distilbert_advice_signed"
  )],
  1,
  sd,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

df$sent_roberta_avg <- rowMeans(
  df[, c(
    "roberta_summary_signed",
    "roberta_pros_signed",
    "roberta_cons_signed",
    "roberta_advice_signed"
  )],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

df$sent_roberta_sd <- apply(
  df[, c(
    "roberta_summary_signed",
    "roberta_pros_signed",
    "roberta_cons_signed",
    "roberta_advice_signed"
  )],
  1,
  sd,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

sent_features <- c(
  "sent_vader_avg",
  "sent_vader_sd",
  "sent_distilbert_avg",
  "sent_distilbert_sd",
  "sent_roberta_avg",
  "sent_roberta_sd"
)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 3. GLOBAL DATA PREP
# ---------------------------------------------------------

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(summary, advice_to_management, review_pros, review_cons), ~ replace_na(., "")),
    text_all = paste(summary, review_pros, review_cons, advice_to_management, sep = " "),
    
    rating_group = case_when(
      rating_overall <= 2 ~ "Low",
      rating_overall == 3 ~ "Mid",
      rating_overall >= 4 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    rating_group = factor(rating_group, levels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")),
    
    employee_job_quit = as.factor(employee_job_quit),
    sector = as.factor(sector),
    covid_related_review = as.factor(covid_related_review),
    career_missing = as.factor(career_missing),
    flags_business_outlook = as.factor(flags_business_outlook),
    flags_ceo_approval = as.factor(flags_ceo_approval)
  )
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4. FEATURE SETS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

num_features_base <- c(
  "rating_culture_values",
  "rating_work_life",
  "rating_compensation_benefits",
  "rating_senior_leadership",
  "rating_career_opportunities",
  "rating_diversity_inclusion",
  "flags_business_outlook",
  "flags_ceo_approval",
  "employee_length",
  "employee_job_quit",
  "sector",
  "covid_related_review",
  "career_missing"
)

num_features_plus_sent <- c(num_features_base, sent_features)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 5. SHARED HELPERS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

evaluate_multiclass <- function(pred_class, actual) {
  pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = levels(actual))
  cm <- caret::confusionMatrix(pred_class, actual)
  
  list(
    accuracy = as.numeric(cm$overall["Accuracy"]),
    kappa = as.numeric(cm$overall["Kappa"]),
    confusion_matrix = cm
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 6. BUILD TF-IDF MATRICES
#    mode = unigram / bigram / both
# ---------------------------------------------------------

build_tfidf_matrix <- function(data, mode = c("unigram", "bigram", "both"), top_n = 2000, vocab = NULL) {
  mode <- match.arg(mode)
  
  df_id <- data %>%
    mutate(doc_id = row_number()) %>%
    select(doc_id, text_all)
  
  uni_tbl <- df_id %>%
    unnest_tokens(term, text_all, token = "words") %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
    anti_join(stop_words, by = c("term" = "word"))
  
  bi_tbl <- df_id %>%
    unnest_tokens(term, text_all, token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
    separate(term, into = c("w1", "w2"), sep = " ", remove = FALSE) %>%
    filter(str_detect(w1, "^[a-z]+$"), str_detect(w2, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
    filter(!w1 %in% stop_words$word, !w2 %in% stop_words$word) %>%
    transmute(doc_id, term = paste(w1, w2, sep = "_"))
  
  tokens <- switch(
    mode,
    unigram = uni_tbl,
    bigram = bi_tbl,
    both = bind_rows(uni_tbl, bi_tbl)
  )
  
  if (is.null(vocab)) {
    vocab <- tokens %>%
      count(term, sort = TRUE) %>%
      slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
      pull(term)
  }
  
  tokens <- tokens %>%
    filter(term %in% vocab)
  
  tfidf_tbl <- tokens %>%
    count(doc_id, term, sort = FALSE) %>%
    bind_tf_idf(term, doc_id, n)
  
  term_index <- setNames(seq_along(vocab), vocab)
  
  if (nrow(tfidf_tbl) == 0) {
    sparse_mat <- Matrix::sparseMatrix(
      i = integer(0),
      j = integer(0),
      dims = c(nrow(df_id), length(vocab)),
      dimnames = list(as.character(df_id$doc_id), vocab)
    )
  } else {
    sparse_mat <- Matrix::sparseMatrix(
      i = tfidf_tbl$doc_id,
      j = term_index[tfidf_tbl$term],
      x = tfidf_tbl$tf_idf,
      dims = c(nrow(df_id), length(vocab)),
      dimnames = list(as.character(df_id$doc_id), vocab)
    )
  }
  
  list(
    x = sparse_mat,
    vocab = vocab
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 7. NUMERICAL DESIGN MATRIX BUILDER
# ---------------------------------------------------------

build_numeric_matrix <- function(data, feature_cols) {
  formula_x <- as.formula(
    paste("~", paste(feature_cols, collapse = " + "))
  )
  
  mm <- model.matrix(formula_x, data = data)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  Matrix::Matrix(mm, sparse = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 8. APPEND SENTIMENT TO SPARSE MATRIX
# ---------------------------------------------------------

append_sentiment_matrix <- function(x_sparse, data, sent_cols) {
  sent_df <- data %>%
    select(all_of(sent_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(., 0)))
  
  sent_mat <- as.matrix(sent_df)
  sent_mat <- Matrix::Matrix(sent_mat, sparse = TRUE)
  
  cbind(x_sparse, sent_mat)
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 9. TF-IDF CLASSIFICATION PIPELINE
#    target = rating_group
# ---------------------------------------------------------

run_tfidf_classification <- function(df, mode = c("unigram", "bigram", "both"),
                                     add_sentiment = FALSE,
                                     sent_cols = sent_features,
                                     seed = 123,
                                     top_n = 2000,
                                     alpha = 1) {
  mode <- match.arg(mode)
  
  keep_cols <- c("rating_group", "text_all")
  if (add_sentiment) keep_cols <- c(keep_cols, sent_cols)
  
  df_model <- df %>%
    select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(rating_group))
  
  set.seed(seed)
  idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$rating_group, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  
  train_df <- df_model[idx, ]
  test_df  <- df_model[-idx, ]
  
  train_tfidf <- build_tfidf_matrix(train_df, mode = mode, top_n = top_n)
  test_tfidf  <- build_tfidf_matrix(test_df, mode = mode, vocab = train_tfidf$vocab)
  
  x_train <- train_tfidf$x
  x_test  <- test_tfidf$x
  
  if (add_sentiment) {
    x_train <- append_sentiment_matrix(x_train, train_df, sent_cols)
    x_test  <- append_sentiment_matrix(x_test, test_df, sent_cols)
  }
  
  y_train <- train_df$rating_group
  y_test  <- test_df$rating_group
  
  lambda_grid <- 10^seq(1, -2, length = 100)
  
  set.seed(seed)
  cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
    x_train, y_train,
    family = "multinomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = lambda_grid
  )
  
  pred_class <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "class")
  pred_class <- as.vector(pred_class)
  pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = levels(y_test))
  
  eval <- evaluate_multiclass(pred_class, y_test)
  
  list(
    model = cv_fit,
    accuracy = eval$accuracy,
    kappa = eval$kappa,
    confusion_matrix = eval$confusion_matrix
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 10. NUMERICAL CLASSIFICATION PIPELINE
#     target = rating_group
# ---------------------------------------------------------

run_numeric_classification <- function(df, feature_cols, seed = 123, alpha = 1) {
  df_model <- df %>%
    select(rating_group, all_of(feature_cols)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(rating_group)) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  set.seed(seed)
  idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$rating_group, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  
  train_df <- df_model[idx, ]
  test_df  <- df_model[-idx, ]
  
  x_train <- build_numeric_matrix(train_df, feature_cols)
  x_test  <- build_numeric_matrix(test_df, feature_cols)
  
  common_cols <- intersect(colnames(x_train), colnames(x_test))
  x_train <- x_train[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
  x_test  <- x_test[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
  
  y_train <- train_df$rating_group
  y_test  <- test_df$rating_group
  
  lambda_grid <- 10^seq(1, -2, length = 100)
  
  set.seed(seed)
  cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
    x_train, y_train,
    family = "multinomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = lambda_grid
  )
  
  pred_class <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "class")
  pred_class <- as.vector(pred_class)
  pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = levels(y_test))
  
  eval <- evaluate_multiclass(pred_class, y_test)
  
  list(
    model = cv_fit,
    accuracy = eval$accuracy,
    kappa = eval$kappa,
    confusion_matrix = eval$confusion_matrix
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 11. TF-IDF + NUMERICAL + SENTIMENT (FULL MODEL)
#    target = rating_group
# ---------------------------------------------------------

run_full_classification <- function(df,
                                    mode = c("unigram", "bigram", "both"),
                                    num_features,
                                    sent_features,
                                    seed = 123,
                                    top_n = 2000,
                                    alpha = 0.5) {
  mode <- match.arg(mode)
  
  df_model <- df %>%
    select(
      rating_group,
      text_all,
      all_of(num_features),
      all_of(sent_features)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(rating_group)) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  set.seed(seed)
  idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$rating_group, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  
  train_df <- df_model[idx, ]
  test_df  <- df_model[-idx, ]
  
  train_tfidf <- build_tfidf_matrix(train_df, mode = mode, top_n = top_n)
  test_tfidf  <- build_tfidf_matrix(test_df, mode = mode, vocab = train_tfidf$vocab)
  
  x_train_text <- train_tfidf$x
  x_test_text  <- test_tfidf$x
  
  x_train_num <- build_numeric_matrix(train_df, num_features)
  x_test_num  <- build_numeric_matrix(test_df, num_features)
  
  common_cols_num <- intersect(colnames(x_train_num), colnames(x_test_num))
  x_train_num <- x_train_num[, common_cols_num, drop = FALSE]
  x_test_num  <- x_test_num[, common_cols_num, drop = FALSE]
  
  x_train_sent <- train_df %>%
    select(all_of(sent_features)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(., 0))) %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    Matrix::Matrix(sparse = TRUE)
  
  x_test_sent <- test_df %>%
    select(all_of(sent_features)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(., 0))) %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    Matrix::Matrix(sparse = TRUE)
  
  x_train <- cbind(x_train_text, x_train_num, x_train_sent)
  x_test  <- cbind(x_test_text, x_test_num, x_test_sent)
  
  y_train <- train_df$rating_group
  y_test  <- test_df$rating_group
  
  lambda_grid <- 10^seq(1, -2, length = 100)
  
  set.seed(seed)
  cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
    x_train, y_train,
    family = "multinomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = lambda_grid
  )
  
  pred_class <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "class")
  pred_class <- as.vector(pred_class)
  pred_class <- factor(pred_class, levels = levels(y_test))
  
  eval <- evaluate_multiclass(pred_class, y_test)
  
  list(
    model = cv_fit,
    accuracy = eval$accuracy,
    kappa = eval$kappa,
    confusion_matrix = eval$confusion_matrix
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 12. RUN ALL CLASSIFICATION MODELS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

clf_tfidf_uni <- run_tfidf_classification(df, mode = "unigram", add_sentiment = FALSE, alpha = 1)
clf_tfidf_bi <- run_tfidf_classification(df, mode = "bigram", add_sentiment = FALSE, alpha = 0.5)
clf_tfidf_both <- run_tfidf_classification(df, mode = "both", add_sentiment = FALSE, alpha = 0.5)
clf_tfidf_sent <- run_tfidf_classification(df, mode = "both", add_sentiment = TRUE, sent_cols = sent_features, alpha = 0.5)

clf_num <- run_numeric_classification(df, num_features_base, alpha = 1)
clf_num_sent <- run_numeric_classification(df, num_features_plus_sent, alpha = 1)

clf_full <- run_full_classification(
  df,
  mode = "both",
  num_features = num_features_base,
  sent_features = sent_features,
  alpha = 0.5
)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 13. FINAL CLASSIFICATION COMPARISON TABLE
# ---------------------------------------------------------

classification_comparison <- data.frame(
  Model = c(
    "TF-IDF Unigrams",
    "TF-IDF Bigrams",
    "TF-IDF Unigrams + Bigrams",
    "TF-IDF Unigrams + Bigrams + Sentiment",
    "Numerical Features",
    "Numerical Features + Sentiment",
    "TF-IDF + Numerical + Sentiment"
  ),
  Accuracy = c(
    clf_tfidf_uni$accuracy,
    clf_tfidf_bi$accuracy,
    clf_tfidf_both$accuracy,
    clf_tfidf_sent$accuracy,
    clf_num$accuracy,
    clf_num_sent$accuracy,
    clf_full$accuracy
  ),
  Kappa = c(
    clf_tfidf_uni$kappa,
    clf_tfidf_bi$kappa,
    clf_tfidf_both$kappa,
    clf_tfidf_sent$kappa,
    clf_num$kappa,
    clf_num_sent$kappa,
    clf_full$kappa
  )
) %>%
  arrange(desc(Accuracy))

classification_comparison
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 14. OPTIONAL: VIEW CONFUSION MATRICES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

clf_tfidf_sent$confusion_matrix
clf_num_sent$confusion_matrix
clf_full$confusion_matrix
```
